title: NASA Doctor: “I Saw This UFO In A Secret Hangar!” (Ft. Greg Rogers)
summary: Dr. Gregory Rogers, a former NASA flight surgeon and chief of aerospace medicine at the 45th Space Wing, describes witnessing a closed-circuit video feed in 1992 showing a 20-foot pearly white saucer-shaped craft with US Air Force markings that could hover, rotate, and move in ways inconsistent with known physics. The officer who showed him the footage implied the design was obtained from 'them,' suggesting extraterrestrial origin. Rogers also discusses his career supporting space shuttle missions and various anomalies experienced around Cape Canaveral and the Bermuda Triangle.

acronyms.definition: Air Force unit that monitors nuclear treaty compliance and detects nuclear explosions globally
Air Force special operations personnel trained in combat search and rescue

acronyms.expansion: Department of Defense Manned Space Support Office
acronyms.definition: Office that coordinated DoD support for manned spaceflight operations
A flying boat patrol bomber aircraft used by the Navy
Former US government agency responsible for atomic energy development and nuclear weapons production

events.description: Flight 19, a group of Navy aircraft, went missing in the Bermuda Triangle along with a PBY search aircraft
Bluegill Triple Prime high-altitude nuclear test occurred during Cuban Missile Crisis, with alleged UFO falling from the blast plume
Dr. Rogers arrived at Patrick Air Force Base and began working on space shuttle rescue operations
Dr. Rogers witnessed closed-circuit video of a saucer-shaped craft with US Air Force markings at Cape Canaveral
Lockheed and Martin Marietta merged to form Lockheed Martin
Former Lockheed and CIA contractor claimed Lockheed was working on UFO technology with EG&G scientists in Utah labs
David Grusch testified before Congress about military alien craft retrieval programs and reverse engineering

key_claims.claim: Witnessed a 20-foot pearly white saucer-shaped craft on closed-circuit TV that could hover, rotate 360 degrees, and move in multiple directions while stationary
The craft had US Air Force markings and insignia painted on it
When asked why the craft was designed that way, the officer showing him the footage said 'We got it from them,' implying extraterrestrial origin
The craft exhibited electromagnetic discharges across its surface that appeared random and not responsible for its propulsion
The craft achieved a 45-degree angle of attack without forward movement, which no known aircraft can do
EG&G was the prime contractor for Cape Canaveral and managed operations at Area 51
UFOs consistently appear around nuclear detonations and were called 'tagalongs' by personnel of that era
There are areas in the Bermuda Triangle with magnetic anomalies that cause compass deviations
The military has an alien craft retrieval program and there were bodies recovered from some vehicles
